prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns, I estimated a 7-day price prediction using assumed daily volatility of ~1.5-2%. The point estimate reflects modest upward momentum. Confidence intervals widen progressively to account for increasing uncertainty: 50% CI spans ~±2-3%, 80% CI spans ~±4-5%, and 90% CI spans ~±5-6% from the point estimate, reflecting typical short-term equity price movements.
